scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://sync-worker.localhost -o dist/sync-worker.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://sync-worker.localhost -o dist/sync-worker.wasm
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
